title: chore(deps): update dependency openapi-schema-validator to ~=0.8.1
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | [Age](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [Confidence](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |
|---|---|---|---|
| [openapi-schema-validator](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator) | `~=0.7.1` → `~=0.8.1` | ![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/pypi/openapi-schema-validator/0.8.1?slim=true) | ![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/pypi/openapi-schema-validator/0.7.3/0.8.1?slim=true) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator (openapi-schema-validator)</summary>

### [`v0.8.1`](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator/releases/tag/0.8.1)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator/compare/0.8.0...0.8.1)

#### Features

- Speed up validate() with validator caching and optional schema-check fast path [#​273](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator/issues/273)

### [`v0.8.0`](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator/releases/tag/0.8.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator/compare/0.7.3...0.8.0)

#### Security

- Harden validate defaults for remote $ref resolution [#​270](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator/issues/270)

#### Backward incompatibilities

- By default, `validate` uses a local-only empty registry to avoid implicit remote $ref retrieval. To resolve external references, pass an explicit `registry`. Set `allow_remote_references=True` only if you explicitly accept jsonschema's default remote retrieval behavior.

</details>

---
